mapper.sql:
SELECT inspection_type, target_type, inspection_date, inspection_result, inspection_reason, risk_score, CASE WHEN risk_score >= 4 THEN 'RISK' WHEN risk_score >= 2 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS risk_level FROM ( SELECT 'EQUIPMENT' AS inspection_type, 'EQUIPMENT' AS target_type, e.elog_sdate AS inspection_date, TO_CHAR(e.elog_result) AS inspection_result, TO_CHAR(e.elog_reason) AS inspection_reason, CASE WHEN e.elog_reason = '30' THEN 4 WHEN e.elog_reason = '20' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS risk_score FROM eq_log e WHERE e.elog_usage = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'GHP' AS inspection_type, CASE WHEN g.glog_whid IS NOT NULL THEN 'WAREHOUSE' WHEN g.glog_wpid IS NOT NULL THEN 'WORKPLACE' ELSE 'GHP' END AS target_type, g.glog_date AS inspection_date, TO_CHAR(g.glog_result) AS inspection_result, NVL(g.glog_action, '정상') AS inspection_reason, CASE WHEN g.glog_result = '부적합' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END AS risk_score FROM ghp_log g WHERE g.glog_usage = 'Y' )

WHERE 1 = 1
AND inspection_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND inspection_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND inspection_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND risk_level = #{riskLevel}
AND ( UPPER(inspection_type) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{equipKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(target_type) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{equipKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(inspection_result) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{equipKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(inspection_reason) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{equipKeyword} || '%') )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInspectionCount,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'NORMAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS normalCount,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS warningCount,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'RISK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS riskCount,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN risk_level = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS warningRate,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN risk_level = 'RISK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS riskRate
FROM (
)

SELECT TO_CHAR(inspection_date, 'IYYY') || '-W' || TO_CHAR(inspection_date, 'IW') AS "inspectionDate",
SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'RISK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS "riskCount",
SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS "warningCount"
FROM (
)
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(inspection_date, 'IYYY') || '-W' || TO_CHAR(inspection_date, 'IW') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(inspection_date, 'IYYY') || '-W' || TO_CHAR(inspection_date, 'IW')
